view.title: Validate explicit UC need #5
view.subtitle: Step blocked: Exploratory validation blocked: Insufficient evidence to validate the requirement for fallback channel policy when the preferred channel is blocked.

items.label: Error
items.value: Exploratory validation blocked: Insufficient evidence to validate the requirement for fallback channel policy when the preferred channel is blocked.

items.label: Assessment
items.value: The exploratory step requires validation of the fallback channel policy when the preferred channel is blocked. However, the evidence provided does not include specific API reads or persisted state checks that confirm this requirement. The linked use case describes a scenario where SMS is blocked during quiet hours and an email is sent instead, but it lacks concrete evidence of how the fallback mechanism is implemented, leading to an inconclusive result.
